entries.definition:
كتاب الواو

وضم

(وطأ) الواو والطاء والهمزة. كلمةٌ تدلُّ على تمهيدِ شيءٍ وتسهيله. ووطَّأْتُ لـه المكان. والوِطاءُ: ما توطّأْتَ به من فِراش. ووَطِئْتُه برجلي أطَؤُه.

وطب - وطح - وطد

وفي الحديث: "اشدُدْ وَطأتَك على مُضَرَ" والمواطَأة: الموافَقَةُ على أمرٍ يوطِّئه كلُّ* 768 واحدٍ لصاحبه.

(3:96) إِنَّ أَوَّلَ بَيْتٍ وُضِعَ لِلنَّاسِ لَلَّذِي بِبَكَّةَ the first House [of worship] to
be established for mankind was the one at Bacca (i.e. Mecca) 2 to
be laid open, to be put in place (18:49) وَوُضِعَ الْكِتَابُ the record [of
deeds] will be laid open.

أَوْضَع ʾawḍaʿa [v. IV, trans.] to drive through or scurry around
in the midst of a group with bad intentions *(9:47) وَلَأَوْضَعُوا خِلَالَكُمْ
they would have scurried around in your midst trying to stir up
troubles.

مَوَاضِع mawāḍiʿ [pl. of n. of place مَوْضِع mawḍiʿ] places,
settings *(4:46) يُحَرِّفُونَ الْكَلِمَ عَنْ مَوَاضِعِهِ they distort words out of
their contexts.

مَوْضُوع mawḍūʿ [pass. part.] placed in, laid out, made ready
(88:14) وَأَكْوَابٌ مَوْضُوعَةٌ goblets placed before them.
entries.definition_english:

entries.definition:
w–ṭ–ʾ low land; force, gravity, pressure, to tread underfoot, to
defeat, to raid; to have sexual intercourse; to facilitate, to be
approachable, to agree with, to match, to synchronise. Of this
root, four forms occur six times in the Qur’an: تَطَأُ taṭaʾu three
times; يُوَاطِئ yuwāṭiʾ once; وَطْء waṭʾ once and مَوْطِئ mawṭiʾ once.

تَطَأُ taṭaʾu [imperf. v. وَطَأ waṭaʾa, trans.] 1 to step on, to set foot
on, to tread (33:27) وَأَرْضًا لَمْ تَطَئُوهَا [He will give you] a land you
have never trodden 2 to trample underfoot, to harm *(48:25) وَلَوْلَا
رِجَالٌ مُؤْمِنُونَ وَنِسَاءٌ مُؤْمِنَاتٌ لَمْ تَعْلَمُوهُمْ أَنْ تَطَئُوهُمْ
and if there had not been
believing men and believing women [among them], whom you did
not know, you would have harmed [lit. trampled underfoot] them
[the disbelievers].

يُوَاطِئ yuwāṭiʾ [imperf. of v. III وَاطَأ wāṭaʾa, trans.] to cause to
match up, to cause to agree, to cause to conform with (9:37) يَحِلُّونَهُ

1032
